block.refinedstorage.quartz_enriched_iro: Bloco de ferro com quartzo infundido
block.refinedstorage.creative_fluid_stor: Bloco de armazenamento de fluido Criativo
block.refinedstorage.security_manager.he: Quando esse dispositivo está ativado, irá proteger a rede por padrão e as operações de todos os blocos. Comece inserindo cartões de segurança para permitir ou rejeitar operações especificar para um jogador.
gui.refinedstorage.controller.redstone_m: Quando este dispositivo estiver inativo, a rede de armazenamento não poderá usar este dispositivo como fonte de energia.
gui.refinedstorage.storage.redstone_mode: Quando este dispositivo estiver inativo, o armazenamento contido não estará mais acessível a partir da rede de armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.storage.filter_help: Os recursos que podem ou não ser permitidos neste armazenamento, dependendo se o dispositivo está no modo de lista de permissões ou lista de bloqueio.
gui.refinedstorage.storage.filter_mode.e: Sem filtros configurados, nenhum recurso será aceito neste armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.storage.filter_mode.a: Só permite recursos neste armazenamento que está configurado nos filtros.
gui.refinedstorage.storage.filter_mode.b: Proíbe recursos no armazenamento configurados nos filtros.
gui.refinedstorage.grid.auto_selected.he: Selecionar automaticamente a caixa de pesquisa ao abrir a Grade.
gui.refinedstorage.grid.synchronization_: Dessincronizar a caixa de pesquisa de texto.
gui.refinedstorage.grid.pattern_in_inven: Esse recurso tem um Modelo em seu inventário.
gui.refinedstorage.crafting_grid.press_s: Pressione SHIFT + CTRL para mostrar apenas itens usados na receita.
gui.refinedstorage.pattern_grid.fuzzy_mo: Corresponder as entradas do modelo, ignorando componentes.
Corresponder exatamente as entradas do modelo.
gui.refinedstorage.pattern_grid.processi: Os recursos vão ser extraídos do armazenamento da rede e serão inseridos no inventário do alvo.
Os recursos esperados vão ser retornados para o armazenamento da rede para completar a tarefa de criação com sucesso.
Clique para configurar a quantia e alternativas
gui.refinedstorage.detector.mode.under: Emitir sinal de redstone quando estiver abaixo da quantidade.
gui.refinedstorage.detector.mode.equal: Emitir sinal de "redstone" quando quantidade for exata
gui.refinedstorage.detector.mode.above: Emitir sinal de "redstone" quando a quantidade for exata
gui.refinedstorage.detector.filter_help: O recurso que deve ser detectado na rede de armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.destructor.pickup_ite: Pegar itens ao invés de quebrar
gui.refinedstorage.destructor.filter_hel: Os blocos que podem ou não ser destruídos, dependendo se o dispositivo está no modo de lista de permissões ou lista de bloqueios.
gui.refinedstorage.destructor.filter_mod: Apenas permitir blocos na rede de armazenamento configurados nos filtros.
Restringir blocos na rede de armazenamento configurados nos filtros.
gui.refinedstorage.constructor.drop_item: Soltar itens ao invés de colocar blocos
gui.refinedstorage.constructor.filter_he: Os recursos que devem ser colocados da rede de armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.interface.filter_help: Os recursos que devem ser exportados da rede de armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.exporter.filter_help: Os recursos que devem ser exportados da rede de armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.importer.filter_help: Os recursos que podem ser importados do inventário do alvo.
Apenas permitir recursos na rede de armazenamento configurados nos filtros.
Restringir recursos na rede de armazenamento configurados nos filtros.
Esse dispositivo estará sempre ativo, independentemente do sinal redstone.
gui.refinedstorage.redstone_mode.high.he: Esse dispositivo estará ativo apenas com sinal de redstone.
gui.refinedstorage.redstone_mode.low.hel: Esse dispositivo apenas estará ativo sem sinal de redstone.
gui.refinedstorage.scheduling_mode.defau: Usar o primeiro disponível no filtro.
gui.refinedstorage.priority.storage_help: A ordem em que a rede de armazenamento irá inserir ou extrair recursos, priorizando os de maior valor.
gui.refinedstorage.priority.crafter_help: Se múltiplos modelos existirem para um recurso, a fabricação irá priorizar o modelo no auto-fabricador com a maior prioridade.
gui.refinedstorage.fuzzy_mode.on.storage: Corresponder os filtros da lista de permissões ou lista de bloqueios, ignorando os componentes.
gui.refinedstorage.fuzzy_mode.on.extract: Corresponder os filtros ao serem extraídos da rede de armazenamento, ignorando componentes.
Corresponder os filtros ao serem extraídos da fonte, ignorando componentes.
gui.refinedstorage.fuzzy_mode.off.storag: Corresponder exatamente os filtros da lista de permissão ou lista de bloqueios.
gui.refinedstorage.fuzzy_mode.off.extrac: Corresponder exatamente os filtros quando extraídos da rede de armazenamento.
Corresponder exatamente os filtros quando extraídos da fonte.
gui.refinedstorage.access_mode.insert_ex: A rede de armazenamento tera permissão de inserir ou extrair desse armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.access_mode.insert.he: A rede de armazenamento tera permissão de inserir nesse armazenamento. Os recursos contidos ainda serão visíveis em uma grade.
gui.refinedstorage.access_mode.extract.h: A rede de armazenamento apenas tera permissão de extrair desse armazenamento.
gui.refinedstorage.void_excess.help: Quando o modo de descarte está ativo e o armazenamento está cheio, continuara aceitando recursos, mas os descartando.
gui.refinedstorage.void_excess.allowlist: Descarte de excesso apenas irá ocorrer quando o armazenamento estiver com a lista de permissão ativa.
gui.refinedstorage.regulator_upgrade.fil: O recurso deve ser regulado no alvo.
gui.refinedstorage.security_manager.reds: Quando esse dispositivo estiver inativo, a rede não será protegida.
gui.refinedstorage.security_manager.fall: Espaço para um Cartão de Segurança de Fallback.
gui.refinedstorage.security_manager.no_f: Adicione um cartão de segurança Fallback no slot definindo as permissões para todos os jogadores sem um cartão de segurança. Por padrão, todas as ações são negadas.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.filter_help: Recursos e padrões que devem ser expostos da rede de entrada para a rede de saída, caso o Relé não esteja no modo de passagem.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.pass_through.he: Se este dispositivo deve passar o sinal completo da rede de entrada como está. Desative isso para expor seletivamente componentes à rede de saída.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.pass_energy.hel: Se este dispositivo deve passar energia da rede de entrada para a rede de saída.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.pass_storage.he: Se este dispositivo deve passar o armazenamento da rede de entrada para a rede de saída.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.pass_security.h: Se este dispositivo deve passar as configurações de segurança da rede de entrada para a rede de saída.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.pass_autocrafti: Se este dispositivo deve passar os modelos de auto-fabricação da rede de entrada para a rede de saída.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.filter_mode.all: Apenas expõe os recursos da rede de entrada para a rede de saída que estão nos filtros.
gui.refinedstorage.relay.filter_mode.blo: Não expor recursos da rede de entrada para a rede de saída que estão nos filtros.
gui.refinedstorage.disk_interface.filter: Apenas permitir recursos nos discos ou na rede configurados nos filtros.
Restringir recursos nos discos ou na rede configurados nos filtros.
The resources that may or may not be allowed transferred from or into the provided storage disks, depending if the device is in allowlist or blocklist mode.
gui.refinedstorage.disk_interface.transf: Insert the resources from the storage disks into the storage network.
Insert the resources from the storage network into the storage disks.
gui.refinedstorage.autocrafter.lock_mode: Lock until redstone pulse is received
Lock until connected machine is empty
Lock until all outputs are received
gui.refinedstorage.autocrafter.chained.h: This autocrafter is part of a chain.
This autocrafter is the head of the chain.
gui.refinedstorage.autocrafter.not_chain: If another autocrafter is facing this one, they'll form a chain, allowing you to have more patterns going into a single machine.
item.refinedstorage.controller.help: Provides the storage network with energy. Multiple are allowed in a single storage network.
Provides the storage network with an infinite source of energy.
item.refinedstorage.disk_drive.help: Accepts storage disks to provide the storage network with storage space.
item.refinedstorage.disk_interface.help: Transfers resources between the storage network and provided storage disks.
item.refinedstorage.grid.help: Allows for interacting with the storage network.
item.refinedstorage.crafting_grid.help: Allows for interacting with the storage network, with crafting abilities.
item.refinedstorage.pattern_grid.help: Allows for the creation of Patterns for use in autocrafting.
item.refinedstorage.importer.help: Imports resources from an external source to the storage network.
item.refinedstorage.exporter.help: Exports resources from the storage network to an external destination.
item.refinedstorage.interface.help: Acts as the combination of an Importer and Exporter.
item.refinedstorage.external_storage.hel: Provides the storage network with storage from an external source.
item.refinedstorage.detector.help: Emits a redstone signal if the storage network contains a resource equal, above or under a given amount.
item.refinedstorage.constructor.help: Places blocks from the storage network in the world.
item.refinedstorage.destructor.help: Destroys blocks from the world and puts them in the storage network.
item.refinedstorage.relay.help: Turn entire sections of a storage network on or off and create new branches of your network.
item.refinedstorage.autocrafter.help: Accepts patterns to store autocraftable resources.
item.refinedstorage.storage_disk.help: Stores %s items. When empty, use while holding to return the Storage Part. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Storage Part.
item.refinedstorage.storage_block.help: Stores %s items. When empty, use while holding to return the Storage Part and Machine Casing. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Storage Part.
item.refinedstorage.creative_storage_dis: Stores an infinite amount of items.
item.refinedstorage.creative_storage_blo: Stores an infinite amount of items.
item.refinedstorage.creative_fluid_stora: Stores an infinite amount of buckets.
Stores an infinite amount of buckets.
item.refinedstorage.wrench.help: Use to rotate blocks or press SHIFT and use to dismantle Refined Storage blocks.
item.refinedstorage.speed_upgrade.help: Increases the operation speed of a storage network device.
item.refinedstorage.stack_upgrade.help: Increases the amount of resources that the storage network device handles per operation.
item.refinedstorage.silk_touch_upgrade.h: Acts like the Silk Touch enchantment on a pickaxe.
item.refinedstorage.fortune_upgrade.help: Yields more resources when breaking a block. Acts like the Fortune enchantment on a pickaxe.
item.refinedstorage.regulator_upgrade.he: In an Exporter, will only export if the amount in the target is less than configured in the upgrade. In an Importer, will only import if the amount in the target is more than configured in the upgrade. Use item to configure.
item.refinedstorage.range_upgrade.help: Increases the range of the Wireless Transmitter.
item.refinedstorage.creative_range_upgra: Provides infinite range for the Wireless Transmitter. Does not work cross-dimensionally.
item.refinedstorage.wireless_transmitter: Provides wireless network access for items like the Wireless Grid. Multiple are allowed in an area for wider coverage.
item.refinedstorage.network_item.unbound: Use on any storage network device to bind.
item.refinedstorage.network_item.cannot_: There is more than one %s in your inventory.
There isn't any %s in your inventory.
item.refinedstorage.configuration_card.c: Cannot apply configuration card to different type of device. It is configured for %s.
item.refinedstorage.configuration_card.e: Use on a storage network device while crouching to copy its configuration and upgrades to the card.
item.refinedstorage.configuration_card.c: Use on the destination storage network device while crouching to transfer the configuration and upgrades. Use while crouching to clear.
item.refinedstorage.network_card.unbound: Use while crouching on a Network Receiver.
item.refinedstorage.network_card.bound_h: Insert into a Network Transmitter. Use while crouching to clear binding.
Transmits a network signal wirelessly. Needs a Network Card that is paired with a Network Receiver.
item.refinedstorage.network_receiver.hel: Receives a network signal wirelessly. Bind a Network Card to this block.
item.refinedstorage.cable.help: Connects storage network devices with each other. For full blocks, will connect to any color. For cable blocks, will only connect to the same color or to the default color (gray).
item.refinedstorage.security_card.unboun: Right click to configure and bind to the current player.
Right click to configure. Use while crouching to clear configuration and binding.
item.refinedstorage.fallback_security_ca: Acts as a fallback if no matching Security Card for a player is found. Right click to configure. Use while crouching to clear configuration.
item.refinedstorage.portable_grid.help: Allows to interact with a storage disk while not being connected to a storage network. Can be used as a block in world, or from your inventory.
item.refinedstorage.storage_monitor.help: A block that displays the current amount of a certain resource in your storage network. SHIFT + right click to configure. Left click to extract a stack, SHIFT + left click to extract a single resource, right click to insert a resource, right click multiple times to insert resources in bulk.
item.refinedstorage.pattern.help: Used in autocrafting to store the recipe to be crafted. Use while crouching to clear.
misc.refinedstorage.no_permission.open: You are not allowed to open the %s.
misc.refinedstorage.no_permission.insert: You are not allowed to insert.
misc.refinedstorage.no_permission.extrac: You are not allowed to extract.
You are not allowed to place a %s here.
You are not allowed to break the %s.
You are not allowed to rotate the %s.
You are not allowed to dismantle the %s.
key.refinedstorage.clear_crafting_grid_m: Clear Crafting Grid matrix to network
Clear Crafting Grid matrix to inventory
permission.refinedstorage.insert.descrip: Whether the player can insert resources in a network.
permission.refinedstorage.extract.descri: Whether the player can extract resources from a network.
permission.refinedstorage.autocrafting.d: Whether the player can start, cancel or view an autocrafting task.
permission.refinedstorage.open.descripti: Whether the player can open network device GUIs.
permission.refinedstorage.build.descript: Whether the player can add or remove network devices.
permission.refinedstorage.security.descr: Whether the player can manage the security options for a network.
text.autoconfig.refinedstorage.title: Refined Storage Configuration
refinedstorage.configuration.title: Refined Storage Configuration
text.autoconfig.refinedstorage.option.sm: Whether scrollbars should use smooth scrolling.
text.autoconfig.refinedstorage.option.ma: Maximum amount of rows when screen size is stretched
The maximum amount of rows that can be displayed when the screen size is stretched.
text.autoconfig.refinedstorage.option.gr: Whether the Grid should use a large font for quantities.
Prevent sorting while SHIFT is down

Whether the Grid should show a detailed tooltip.

advancements.refinedstorage.root.descrip: Use one or multiple Controllers in a storage network to provide your network with energy
advancements.refinedstorage.connecting.d: Use Cable to connect devices with each other, or place devices against each other
advancements.refinedstorage.drives.descr: Craft a Disk Drive to be able to store your storage disks
advancements.refinedstorage.interfacing_: Craft a Disk Interface to transfer resources between the storage network and storage disks
advancements.refinedstorage.storing_item: Craft a Storage Disk and put it in your Disk Drive
advancements.refinedstorage.viewing_your: Craft a Grid to interact with your storage
advancements.refinedstorage.upgrading_yo: Upgrade your Grid to a Crafting Grid to get crafting abilities
advancements.refinedstorage.storing_flui: Craft a Fluid Storage Disk and put it in your Disk Drive
advancements.refinedstorage.importing.de: Get resources into the storage network with an Importer
advancements.refinedstorage.exporting.de: Get resources out of the storage network with an Exporter
advancements.refinedstorage.upgrading.de: Craft an Upgrade to improve various devices
advancements.refinedstorage.interface_to: Export and import items at the same time with an Interface
advancements.refinedstorage.storing_exte: Use an External Storage to provide the network with storage from an external block like a chest
advancements.refinedstorage.detecting.de: Use redstone to check resources stored in the storage network
advancements.refinedstorage.construction: Get blocks from the storage network into the world with a Constructor
Get blocks from in the world into the storage network with a Destructor
advancements.refinedstorage.wireless.des: Access your resources wirelessly with a Wireless Grid
advancements.refinedstorage.better_than_: Craft a Storage Monitor to view, insert or extract resources in a storage network
advancements.refinedstorage.no_cables_re: Add extra components to your storage network without using cables by using a Network Transmitter, Network Receiver and Network Card
advancements.refinedstorage.portable_sto: Craft a Portable Grid to access the content of disks without requiring a storage network
advancements.refinedstorage.security.des: Secure your storage network with a Security Manager and a Security Card
advancements.refinedstorage.conditional_: Turn entire sections of a storage network on or off and create new branches of your network with a Relay
advancements.refinedstorage.autocrafting: Automate crafting with an Autocrafter by using patterns created in a Pattern Grid
